name: Minyan Zayit
subtitle: Antizionist Jewish Community in Somerville, MA
description: Minyan Zayit is building a lay-led, anti-Zionist, traditional-egalitarian Jewish community in Somerville, Massachusetts. We are creating a grassroots spiritual home that rejects the hold of Zionism on contemporary Jewish identity and that moves a rich, anti-Zionist Judaism from the margins to the center of a living and thriving Jewish life.
